response.global_analysis:
1. Lyrics & Music: Handled the opening and main parts of the song 'Identity' by Kanaria, matching the performance audio with standard lyrics.
2. Talk Segment: Performed manual transcription and translation for the interaction between Kronii and her illustrator/guest Wada-mama, capturing both English and Japanese spoken dialogue.
3. Timing: Synchronized timestamps precisely to vocal cues, avoiding overlapping or cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 光るあなたのアイデンティティ
subtitles.english: Your shining identity.

subtitles.english: A difficult pride, jump into the dangerous

subtitles.english: And then betrayal, beg for tears

subtitles.english: Dance la la la and a dangerous gait

subtitles.english: Focus on the two hidden behind

subtitles.english: I finally found the identity of the mystery

subtitles.english: Surely love is a reverse program

subtitles.original: ただ差し詰めここから行き着くは...
subtitles.english: In the end, what you reach from here is...

subtitles.original: アイデンティティ それは希望のアイデンティティ
subtitles.english: Identity, that is the identity of hope

subtitles.original: アイデンティティ 唸れ君一人のせい
subtitles.english: Identity, wail, it's all your fault alone

subtitles.original: まだ捨てないで 待って それは一つ二つのデスティニー
subtitles.english: Don't throw it away yet, wait, that is one, two destinies

subtitles.original: すぐさまハッピー 落ちる流れ星と
subtitles.english: Immediately happy, falling shooting stars and...

subtitles.original: 歪なあの星
subtitles.english: that warped star

subtitles.original: 重なる面影に寄り添う そっと君に寄り添う
subtitles.english: I cuddle up to the overlapping memories, I gently cuddle up to you

subtitles.original: 弾け出す視界 胸に飛び込む
subtitles.english: My field of vision bursts, jumping into my chest...

subtitles.original: ハート
subtitles.english: heart

subtitles.original: 刻むあなたのアイデンティティ
subtitles.english: Engraving your identity

subtitles.original: And now, it's time for our special guest to appear!
subtitles.english: And now, it's time for our special guest to appear!

subtitles.original: Um, Wada-mama, please come in!
subtitles.english: Um, Wada-mama, please come in!

subtitles.original: Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: Yay! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Um, I was hoping to have Wada-mama appear at this year's birthday celebration,
subtitles.english: Um, I was hoping to have Wada-mama appear at this year's birthday celebration,

subtitles.original: so I tried to reach out and, uh, she accepted,
subtitles.english: so I tried to reach out and, uh, she accepted,

subtitles.original: and I'm so happy! Yay!
subtitles.english: and I'm so happy! Yay!

subtitles.original: えっと、お話が最初来たときは、すごびっくりしたんだけど、
subtitles.english: Well, when I first heard about it, I was really surprised, but...

subtitles.original: 今日はすごいお誕生日の素敵な日なので、
subtitles.english: today is such a wonderful day for your birthday,

subtitles.original: ここにこれてとっても嬉しいです。おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: so I'm very happy to be here. Congratulations!

subtitles.original: 私も嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy too!

subtitles.original: 来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: And, um, since we have this opportunity, can I ask, uh, Wada-mama some questions?
subtitles.english: And, um, since we have this opportunity, can I ask, uh, Wada-mama some questions?

subtitles.original: うん、いいよ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, sure.

subtitles.original: Um... like, let's say... hmm... what's your favorite food?
subtitles.english: Um... like, let's say... hmm... what's your favorite food?

subtitles.original: あんこです！
subtitles.english: It's Anko (sweet red bean paste)!

subtitles.original: And then?
subtitles.english: And then?

subtitles.original: あんこです。
subtitles.english: Anko.

subtitles.original: オンリーあんこ。
subtitles.english: Only Anko.

subtitles.original: Oh, that's it? Oh, okay. Wow!
subtitles.english: Oh, that's it? Oh, okay. Wow!

subtitles.original: 嘘だけど。
subtitles.english: Just kidding.

subtitles.original: いっぱいあるけど、あんこが一番好きです。
subtitles.english: There are many things, but Anko is my absolute favorite.

subtitles.original: Ah, okay! I'm going to, I'm going to keep that in mind for next time.
subtitles.english: Ah, okay! I'm going to, I'm going to keep that in mind for next time.

subtitles.original: Um, next case... Oh, I have one more question.
subtitles.english: Um, next case... Oh, I have one more question.

subtitles.original: Uh, what kind of games do you like?
subtitles.english: Uh, what kind of games do you like?

subtitles.original: うんとね、えっと、RPGと...
subtitles.english: Well, let's see. RPGs, and...

subtitles.original: うん。
subtitles.english: Mm-hm.

subtitles.original: うんと、ローグライクのゲームが...
subtitles.english: Um, Roguelike games...

subtitles.original: 好きです。
subtitles.english: ...are what I like.

subtitles.original: アクションが苦手で...
subtitles.english: I'm bad at action games, so...

subtitles.original: でも、簡単なのが好きです。
subtitles.english: But I like simple ones.

subtitles.original: Aw, is that right? And, um, oh yeah!
subtitles.english: Aw, is that right? And, um, oh yeah!

subtitles.original: Uh, I have some exciting news to share together with Wada-mama. Yay!
subtitles.english: Uh, I have some exciting news to share together with Wada-mama. Yay!

subtitles.original: And please, take a look at this! Bam!
subtitles.english: And please, take a look at this! Bam!

subtitles.original: Woo! Woo! And we have so much this time too. It's going to be so awesome!
subtitles.english: Woo! Woo! And we have so much this time too. It's going to be so awesome!

subtitles.original: And, this illustration was drawn by none other than Wada-mama! Yay!
subtitles.english: And, this illustration was drawn by none other than Wada-mama! Yay!

subtitles.original: 描きました！
subtitles.english: I drew it!

subtitles.original: Yes! She's so, she's so talented. Oh my god, I'm so happy!
subtitles.english: Yes! She's so, she's so talented. Oh my god, I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: Um, was there a theme or like a particular detail you focused on for this illustration?
subtitles.english: Um, was there a theme or like a particular detail you focused on for this illustration?

subtitles.original: ハッピのイラストなので、ちょっと派手目に、
subtitles.english: Since it's an illustration for a Happi coat, I made it a bit flashy,

subtitles.original: なんかこうでっかく、みんなが楽しんで着れるような絵にしました。可愛く描けたと思います。
subtitles.english: and drew it big so that everyone can enjoy wearing it. I think I drew it cutely.

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ可愛いです！
subtitles.english: It is incredibly cute!

subtitles.original: 嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: I'm so glad.

subtitles.original: Yay! Yay! And, um, well, let's go through the details.
subtitles.english: Yay! Yay! And, um, well, let's go through the details.

subtitles.original: Um, first, we have this! Tada!
subtitles.english: Um, first, we have this! Tada!

subtitles.original: Woo! Woo!
subtitles.english: Woo! Woo!

subtitles.original: ハッピ用って言っちゃった、ネタバレしちゃった。

subtitles.original: Yeah!

subtitles.original: ごめん。
